input.headline: Best laptop Black Friday 2025 deals, picked by a tech expert

raw.headline: Best laptop Black Friday 2025 deals, picked by a tech expert

winner: The tech expert’s top Black Friday laptop pick? The one that runs on a single AAA battery and still has an “out of battery” warning screen—because who needs performance when you can have irony for under 99 bucks?

candidates.text: Why did the tech expert refuse to pick the best Black Friday laptop deal? Because he already had a *pre-owned* opinion!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Puns on 'pre-owned' and 'opinion' add surprise and specificity, aligning well with the tech expert theme."}

candidates.text: I asked an AI to pick the best Black Friday laptop deal, and it recommended one that can't tell jokes—turns out it's overfitted on my humorless dataset.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with AI humor, specific to the context, concise, and naturally funny."}

candidates.text: Best laptop for Black Friday 2025 deals? Well, I asked my dog, and he recommended the one with built-in treats—turns out, you can multitask between fetch and spreadsheets now.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with the dog recommendation, specific to laptops and Black Friday, concise and natural humor."}
